Rule.label: Rule
Rule.listMainQuery: select name , 'Rule' as entity , id as id , updated_on from rule where id in (select distinct rule_id from rule_configuration where version>0)

ImfStructure.label: Imf
ImfStructure.listMainQuery: select name , 'ImfStructure' as entity , id as id, updated_on from imf where version>0

Tags.label: Tags
Tags.listMainQuery: select name , 'Tags' as entity , id as id, updated_on from tags

Routing.label: Rule
Routing.listMainQuery: select name , 'Routing' as entity , id as id, updated_on from routing where id in (select distinct routing_id from routing_version where version>0)

WorkFlow.label: WorkFlow
WorkFlow.listMainQuery: select wf.name as name,'WorkFlow' as entity, wf.id as id, updated_on from workflow wf join (select name, max(version) version from workflow where version>0 group by name) dwf on wf.version=dwf.version and wf.name=dwf.name

Adapter.label: Adapter
Adapter.listMainQuery: select name , 'Adapter' as entity , id as id, updated_on from adapter where id in (select distinct adapter_id from adapter_configuration where version>0)
